changes.title: Improve dashboard card spacing and readability
evidence: Card grid gap adjusted to var(--space-md) in styles.css and dashboard-preview.html
Padding normalized to standard Outfit/Roboto typography requirements

changes.title: Clarify source and freshness labels on preview cards
evidence: Updated visual_dashboard_preview.js card rendering template with bold, distinct source & freshness indicators

changes.title: Strengthen FAIL-CLOSED visual hierarchy
evidence: Added distinct styling for status-fail-closed status badge
Added red alert background border styling for fail-closed-active elements

changes.title: Make PREVIEW ONLY / LOCAL OPTIONAL banner impossible to miss
evidence: Added high-visibility banner style to side-by-side-review.html and dashboard-preview.html with deep red border and bold warning text

changes.title: Add tablet/iPad readability criteria
evidence: Reviewed media query rules inside styles.css and dashboard-preview.html asserting correct columns scaling on 768px-1024px screens

changes.title: Preserve original cockpit untouched
evidence: Verified control-plane.html git status is completely clean
